hero.title: Start Your
hero.subtitle: Join Linesia, the Minecraft PvP Faction server where every fight matters. Factions, Raids, KitMap and more.

server.label: Join
server.title: How to join Linesia
server.subtitle: Connect from any platform and jump into the adventure
server.javaStep1desc: Launch the game with the latest version available.
server.javaStep2desc: Go to Multiplayer > Add Server and enter the IP.
server.javaStep3desc: Select the server and click Join.
server.bedrockStep1desc: Launch the game on your phone or tablet.
server.bedrockStep2desc: Click Add Server and enter the IP and port 19132.
server.consoleStep1desc: Launch Minecraft on Xbox, PlayStation or Switch.
server.consoleStep2desc: Search for the Gamertag 'LinesiaJoin' and add it as a friend.
server.consoleStep3desc: Go to LinesiaJoin's profile and click 'Join Game'.
server.consoleNoteDesc: On console, you must add the LinesiaJoin bot as a friend to join the server. This is the only connection method.

features.label: Features
features.title: Why choose
features.subtitle: Unique features for an unforgettable experience

pvp.title: Intense PvP Combat
pvp.desc: Fight other players in epic battles with an optimized and balanced PvP system.

factions.title: Faction Raids
factions.desc: Create your faction, build your base and launch raids to dominate the server.

dimensions.title: Unique Dimensions
dimensions.desc: Explore exclusive dimensions like the Ice and Fire Dimensions for rare resources.

events.title: Competitive Events
events.desc: Participate in weekly events: Domination, Nexus, Outpost and more.

progression.title: Progression & Prestiges
progression.desc: Unlock prestige levels, complete quests and become the most powerful player.

community.title: Active Community
community.desc: Join a passionate community of thousands of players on Discord.

news.label: News
news.title: Latest News
news.subtitle: Stay updated with the latest server news

store.label: Store
store.title: Linesia
store.subtitle: Support the server and get gems to unlock exclusive content

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.a1: Yes, Linesia is completely free! The store offers optional cosmetic perks.
faq.a2: Linesia supports Java and Bedrock Edition, as well as consoles via the LinesiaJoin bot.
faq.q3: How do I join a faction?
faq.a3: Use /f join [name] to join a faction or /f create [name] to create one.
faq.a4: Yes, we use an advanced anti-cheat system to ensure fair gameplay.
faq.a5: Through Discord or by email at support@linesia.net. Response within 24 hours.

footer.description: The ultimate Minecraft PvP Faction server. Join thousands of players.
